_comment: Castle wardrobe pack. Internal pack id remains castle; style reset for the medieval European princess wardrobe.

packStyle.name: 城堡宮廷 Castle Court Wardrobe
packStyle.reference: noble formal medieval European royal court fashion for princess ceremonies, palace balls and court rituals; high-status, ornate and ceremonial
packStyle.linework: symmetrical, dignified, graceful drape, wide skirts, fitted bodices, decorated cuffs and collars
packStyle.mood: noble, elegant, formal, ornate, protected, admired, royal
